subject: Religio Pro · landing page lambat — p95 {{p95}}ms (budget {{budget}}ms)
body:
Halo tim Religio Pro,

Landing page /p/<slug> kemarin p95-nya {{p95}}ms — di atas budget {{budget}}ms.

Snapshot {{windowDays}} hari terakhir ({{sample}} sample):
  p50: {{p50}}ms
  p95: {{p95}}ms
  p99: {{p99}}ms
{{perPaketBlock}}
Kemungkinan penyebab:
  - Query DB di paket landing route (paket include hotels+days+prices)
  - Asset besar di hero/foto yang tidak di-cache
  - Server CPU saturasi (cek /api/health uptime + load)
  - Database connection pool habis

Dashboard: {{adminLink}}

— sistem Religio Pro
